business.name: The Wetcha's Handyman, LLC
business.tagline: Richmond's reliable handyman for every fix

hero.headline: One call fixes it *all*
hero.subheadline: From wallpaper installs to security cameras — we show up on time and clean up after.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every home project handled
services_section.subheading: One reliable handyman for all your Richmond home needs

services.title: Wall & Ceiling Work
services.description: Peel and stick wallpaper, chandelier installs, drywall repairs. Clean, precise installations.

services.title: Security & Tech Setup
services.description: Outdoor cameras, doorbell installs, basic wiring. Positioned right, working perfectly.

services.title: Furniture Assembly
services.description: From closet organization systems to sectional sofas. Everything unboxed, built, and boxes hauled away.

services.title: General Repairs
services.description: The everyday fixes that pile up. Outlets, fixtures, small projects done right.

about.heading: Richmond handyman who shows up
about.body: One person, one truck, one fair price. We handle the project from start to cleanup — no subcontractors, no surprises.

reviews.name: Shaina C.
reviews.text: William is amazing — multiple wallpaper installations, always prompt, great work, and always cleans up after. 10/10 recommend!

reviews.name: John F.
reviews.text: Hired William for outdoor security camera install. Communication was clear and professional, meticulous work, respectful of the property.

reviews.name: Riqia T.
reviews.text: Extremely professional! Always on time, gets it done quickly. All-around handyman — closet systems, ceiling fixtures, rewiring.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Richmond and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Reliable handyman service throughout the greater Richmond region

cta.heading: Ready to cross it off the list?
cta.body: Free quotes on all projects. One call gets it scheduled, done right, and cleaned up.
